blended.narrative: Magic Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,985 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
